summary: Sprint 2 passes all 4 required criteria. Build/typecheck 0; 30 telegram tests green (router 6 + capture 4 + outbound 7 + whitelist 13). Router separates /cmd from text; capture is zero-friction via injected sink (imports captureTask, no new dep); all replies via sendSafe; /start regression preserved. The 1 suite failure (src/medical/engine.test.ts MedlinePlus 5s-timeout axis) confirmed pre-existing on Sprint-1 state via git stash — NOT a regression.
